data.name: 小姐！別耽誤我上分！
data.detailed_description:
本作是一款真人真事改編的輕度養成視覺小說，操作主角與兩位女孩展開追夢與情慾的故事！

【遊戲角色】

櫻島茜　 CV：水野 七海

與男主一起打鬧長大的青梅竹馬，因幼時男主一次不經意的相助下走到了一起，在高中畢業時兩人正式交往，但幾年後受不了他的直男癌分手。

平時對學習和生活十分幹練精明，因此從小就是學霸地位，這方面被她時常拿出來數落男主，但兩人的地位在遊戲上則完全相反。

森宮鈴香　CV：麦咲輪紫葵

男主租屋處的鄰居，她的丈夫長年出差，因此被強烈的心理和生理需求所佔據的她，開始對隔壁這個有些幼稚的大男孩產生了莫名的好感。

對外是個性格溫柔婉約、會照顧人的大姊姊，但在她的內心深處，似乎隱藏著嚴重的家庭問題。

【遊戲特色】

❤2名女主角全程日語配音

❤2名女主角可供H和調教

❤４K高品質動態HCG

❤視覺小說+經營養成 

❤單手操作，暢快體驗

❤角色換裝+角色live2d交互

【特別銘謝】

測試：鬆綁、性感女龍歧視

翻譯：英語／Janna、韓語／Rita、日語／ファウナス+（@Faunas_Plus）

data.short_description: 本作是一款視覺小說搭配經營養成類型遊戲，為了成為職業電競選手的男主，意圖透過各種匪夷所思的方式根絕身邊雜念，但斬不斷的緣分持續朝他洶湧襲來，一段夾雜在傲嬌青梅與性感鄰居的奇妙遭遇就此展開！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 俄文, 日文*, 韓文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 土耳其文, 泰文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 阿拉伯文, 義大利文, 丹麥文, 保加利亞文, 印尼語, 挪威文, 捷克文, 烏克蘭文, 荷蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 越南文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.5 or better
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs
  • 處理器: m1 m2 m3 m4 or Intel
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOs
  • 處理器: m1 m2 m3 m4 or Intel

data.name: Miss！Don't Affect my Rank
data.detailed_description:
This work is a visual novel combined with a simulation management game, where you control the protagonist and embark on a journey of dreams and passion with two girls!

【Game Characters】

Akane Sakurajima
The protagonist’s childhood friend, who grew up playing and joking around together. Their bond began when the protagonist unintentionally helped her during their younger days. They officially started dating after graduating high school, but broke up a few years later because she couldn’t tolerate his "straight-man syndrome."
Highly capable and diligent in both academics and daily life, Akane has always been a top student and often uses this to criticize the protagonist. However, their roles are completely reversed when it comes to gaming.

Suzuka Morimiya
The protagonist’s neighbor in his rental apartment. With her husband frequently away on long business trips, Suzuka finds herself overwhelmed by unmet emotional and physical needs, which lead her to develop an inexplicable affection for the somewhat immature young man next door.
On the surface, she is a gentle and caring older-sister figure. However, deep down, she seems to be harboring severe family issues.

【Game Features】

❤ Full Japanese voice acting for the two heroines
❤ Both heroines available for H-scenes and training
❤ 4K high-quality animated HCG
❤ Visual novel + simulation gameplay
❤ One-handed controls for a seamless experience
❤ Character costume customization + live2D interactions

【Special Thanks】
Testers: Reopen,Sexy female dragon
Translation: English / Janna, Korean / Rita, Japanese / Faunas+ (@Faunas_Plus)

data.short_description: This visual novel blends simulation and management gameplay. The protagonist, aiming to become a pro esports player, tries to cut off all distractions but is drawn into a strange adventure with a tsundere childhood friend and a sultry neighbor, where unshakable bonds and passion collide!
data.supported_languages:
English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Russian, Japanese*, Korean, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Turkish, Thai, Spanish - Latin America, Arabic, Italian, Danish, Bulgarian, Indonesian, Norwegian, Czech, Ukrainian, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Vietnamese
*languages with full audio support
